name: marker
description: Provenance markers seeded in the rock mass to trace material flow. 'color-by' selects continuous (contour) vs categorical (label) colouring; 'size-by' scales glyphs by meanDiameter/pixels/uniform. The 'marker-extracted' item draws markers already drawn through a drawpoint with an identical keyword set.

basic_keywords.description: Show or hide the item without removing it.
Choose continuous (contour) or categorical (label) colouring. See sub-item 'color-by'.
Marker glyph drawn at each location.
Scale factor for the drawn glyphs/vectors.
Filter which entities are drawn using range elements (see references/range-elements).
Set item transparency (0 opaque .. 100 fully transparent).

sub_items.name: color-by
sub_items.description: Colouring/sizing options for the marker plot item.

common_usage_patterns.command: plot item create marker size-by meanDiameter
common_usage_patterns.description: Scale marker glyphs by mean fragment diameter.

common_usage_patterns.command: plot item create marker-extracted color-by label group
common_usage_patterns.description: Show markers already extracted, coloured by group.

notes: Probe live with 'plot item create <type> ?' to list top-level keywords, then 'plot item create <type> <kw> ?' for sub-options. Keyword sets here are binary-validated against MassFlow 3D 9.
marker-extracted shares this exact keyword set (draws only extracted markers).
